{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = obelisks (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Obelisks are massive slabs of stone on the [[Erinin plains]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
